patches.summary: Strip the 32-byte SHA-256(host_key) prefix only when it matches the computed hash so older-Chrome cookies are not silently truncated.
patches.reason: The 32-byte plaintext prefix is added by Chrome's M120+ cookie host-binding feature; older Chrome versions write cookies without it. The unconditional strip discarded the first 32 chars of every cookie value, so the session token sent to accounts.superhuman.com was always wrong and RefreshFromChromeCookies never succeeded. We now verify the prefix matches sha256(host) before stripping (greptile P1).

patches.summary: Send Superhuman backend identity headers on authenticated backend calls.
patches.reason: The published CLI needs the browser-derived x-superhuman headers to match the private backend contract.

patches.summary: Replace the generated promoted messages shortcut with the real send, unsend, reminders, snippets, and scheduling workflow.
patches.reason: Superhuman's send path is a multi-step backend workflow that cannot be represented by the original generated messages shortcut alone.

patches.summary: Add local-store-backed folder, search, thread filter, participant, awaiting-reply, RFC822 lookup, watch, and bootstrap workflows.
patches.reason: Agent workflows need composable local mailbox operations with explicit freshness metadata and Gmail history deltas.
patches.validated_outcome: PII scrub gate and full module tests pass.

patches.summary: Add automatic refresh provenance and opt-in response envelopes.
patches.reason: Agents need to know whether command data is fresh, local, or live without parsing command-specific output.

patches.summary: Expose token refresh state, binary age, and 401 re-login hints.
patches.reason: Operators need actionable diagnostics when stored browser credentials are stale or revoked.

patches.summary: Replace session-specific emails, Google user IDs, draft IDs, and names with example placeholders.
patches.reason: The published library must not contain user-specific mailbox artifacts from the implementation session.
patches.validated_outcome: Known-token grep gate returns zero matches.
